narrative: I2.3 defines runtime sdk operator pc worker server for the agent-driven expert system. Runtime & integration — IDE, SDK, headless, MCP tools. In practice, the system operator pc as worker server extends sdk daemon: a dedicated machine drains work-order lanes, runs verify suites, or hosts gpu/tool workloads while the conductor ide session stays thin, then network partition between conductor and worker server triggers h2 with last-known lease state—workers must not assume conductor is reachable for journal writes.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-i 2026-06-28 -->

Operator PC as worker server extends SDK daemon: a dedicated machine drains work-order lanes, runs verify suites, or hosts GPU/tool workloads while the conductor IDE session stays thin. Lease semantics follow [C4.1](C4.1-workstreams-lane-json-leases.md) lane JSON.

Network partition between conductor and worker server triggers H2 with last-known lease state—workers must not assume conductor is reachable for journal writes. Evidence and logs write to shared evidence/ paths or sync back on completion.
